title: Create machine learning models
summary: Machine learning is the foundation for predictive modeling and artificial intelligence. Learn some of the core principles of machine learning and how to use common tools and frameworks to train, evaluate, and use machine learning models.

sections.title: Create machine learning models
sections.summary: Machine learning is the foundation for predictive modeling and artificial intelligence. Learn some of the core principles of machine learning and how to use common tools and frameworks to train, evaluate, and use machine learning models.

lessons.title: Introduction to machine learning concepts
lessons.content_md:
Machine learning is the basis for most modern artificial intelligence solutions. A familiarity with the core concepts on which machine learning is based is an important foundation for understanding AI.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/fundamentals-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Explore and analyze data with Python
lessons.content_md:
Data exploration and analysis is at the core of data science. Data scientists require skills in programming languages like Python to explore, visualize, and manipulate data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-analyze-data-with-python/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore and analyze data with Python

lessons.title: Train and evaluate regression models
lessons.content_md:
Regression is a commonly used kind of machine learning for predicting numeric values.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/train-evaluate-regression-models/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Train and evaluate classification models
lessons.content_md:
Train and evaluate classification models

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/train-evaluate-classification-models/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Train and evaluate clustering models
lessons.content_md:
Clustering is a type of machine learning that is used to group similar items into clusters.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/train-evaluate-cluster-models/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Train and evaluate deep learning models
lessons.content_md:
Train and evaluate deep learning models

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/train-evaluate-deep-learn-models/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Train and evaluate deep learning models

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Create machine learning models
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Create machine learning models**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
